title: 中国叫停Meta收购Manus，颠覆了对新加坡作为人工智能避风港这一角色的押注
content: China has halted Meta’s acquisition of Manus, a move that undermines Singapore’s position as a hub for AI refuge. The decision signals Beijing’s willingness to intervene in major tech deals and challenges expectations that Singapore would continue to attract high‑profile AI investments.

title: DeepSeek 公布多模态模型技术报告后又删除
content: DeepSeek 在 GitHub 发布多模态大模型并公开配套技术报告，提出基于「视觉原语」的创新推理框架，以突破当前多模态大语言模型在空间参照任务中的核心瓶颈。报告指出主流链式思维推理范式局限于语言学领域，现有研究忽视「参照鸿沟」问题，自然语言模糊性会导致模型推理逻辑崩溃。为此，DeepSeek 提出「基于视觉原语的思考」框架，将空间标记提升为推理基本单元，使模型具备「指代」能力，实现对空间关系的精确推演。该框架模型架构高度优化，视觉标记效率高，在相关测试中能与前沿模型匹配，为多模态智能指明方向。不过，随后该论文被删除。 DeepSeek 在 GitHub 发布多模态大模型并公开配套技术报告，提出基于「视觉原语」的创新推理框架，以突破当前多模态大语言模型在空间参照任务中的核心瓶颈。报告指出主流链式思维推理范式局限于语言学领域，现有研究忽视「参照鸿沟」问题，自然语言模糊性会导致模型推理逻辑崩溃。为此，DeepSeek 提出「基于视觉原语的思考」框架，将空间标记提升为推理基本单元，使模型具备「指代」能力，实现对空间关系的精确推演。该框架模型架构高度优化，视觉标记效率高，在相关测试中能与前沿模型匹配，为多模态智能指明方向。不过，随后该论文被删除。 DeepSeek 发布多模态模型及技术报告；小红书官宣组织调整：柯南出任总裁；宇树发布双臂人形机器人，2.69 万元起售 极客公园 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 快科技
eventKey: deepseek-公布多模态模型技术报告后又删除
normalizedTitle: deepseek 公布多模态模型技术报告后又删除
representativeSources: Readhub - 每日早报 - 快科技
scoreReasoning: 顶级AI公司核心模型技术路线变更，且动作异常，是极重要行业信号，但来源可信度需打折。
summary: DeepSeek released a multimodal large model and a technical report that introduced a novel “visual primitive” reasoning framework to overcome spatial reference limitations in current multimodal language models. The report criticized existing chain‑of‑thought approaches for failing to address referential gaps, proposing that spatial tokens become the core reasoning unit to enable accurate spatial inference. Although the framework claimed comparable performance to leading models, the paper was later removed from public access.

title: 新兴市场（EM）的多元化趋势正在消退
content: Emerging markets are increasingly showing reduced diversification, indicating that their markets are becoming more correlated. This trend means that returns on one emerging market are becoming more closely tied to those in others, diminishing the benefits of spreading investment across multiple emerging economies. As a result, portfolio managers may face greater risk of simultaneous losses when relying on diversification within this region.
eventKey: 新兴市场-的多元化趋势正在消退
normalizedTitle: 新兴市场 em 的多元化趋势正在消退
scoreReasoning: 金融时报硬新闻。新兴市场相关性增强的重大投资组合信号，对资产配置有直接影响。
summary: Emerging markets are increasingly showing reduced diversification, indicating that their markets are becoming more correlated. This trend means that returns on one emerging market are becoming more closely tied to those in others, diminishing the benefits of spreading investment across multiple emerging economies. As a result, portfolio managers may face greater risk of simultaneous losses when relying on diversification within this region.

title: 尽管战火纷飞，为何股市却一路飙升
content: Even amid a supply shock, tech stocks continue to drive indices higher. Is the optimism justified? Open side navigation menu Open search bar Search the FT Search Close search bar Close World Home Middle East war Global Economy UK US China Africa Asia Pacific Emerging Markets Europe War in Ukraine Americas Middle East & North Africa Why markets are surging in spite of war The physical world strikes back US warns Europe of delays to arms shipments as Iran war drains stockpiles US to withdraw 5,000 troops from Germany in dispute over Iran conflict Trump’s Iran war leaves US with sharpest fuel shock in G7 US Home US Economy US Companies US Politics & Policy US warns Europe of delays to arms shipments as Iran war drains stockpiles US to withdraw 5,000 troops from Germany in dispute over Iran conflict Trump’s Iran war leaves US with sharpest fuel shock in G7 Trump says he will raise tariff on EU vehicles to 25% Jane Street employees paid $9.4bn in 2025
eventKey: 尽管战火纷飞-为何股市却一路飙升
normalizedTitle: 尽管战火纷飞 为何股市却一路飙升
scoreReasoning: 金融时报权威分析，解读市场与地缘冲突背离的根本驱动力，对投资判断具有直接、及时的价值。
summary: Despite ongoing conflicts, stock markets continue to rise because investors view equities as a hedge against uncertainty, and growth prospects in key sectors remain strong. Policymakers’ monetary easing and aggressive fiscal stimulus further support market optimism. Thus, geopolitical tensions have not deterred investment sentiment, leading to sustained bullish trends in global markets.

title: 今起施行，杭州为具身智能机器人立法
content: 全国首部具身智能机器人领域地方性法规《杭州市促进具身智能机器人产业发展条例》正式施行。杭州已集聚机器人产业相关企业 700 余家，2025 年具身智能产业集群产值达 1068 亿元，专门立法以高质量法治供给护航科技创新，推动高质量发展。 全国首部具身智能机器人领域地方性法规《杭州市促进具身智能机器人产业发展条例》正式施行。杭州已集聚机器人产业相关企业 700 余家，2025 年具身智能产业集群产值达 1068 亿元，专门立法以高质量法治供给护航科技创新，推动高质量发展。 2026-05-01 今起施行，杭州为具身智能机器人立法 2026-01-16 杭州：聚焦具身智能机器人及其他智能终端、新能源装备等 9 个领域，打造千亿级产业集群 2025-10-15 杭州市长姚高员：2027 年实现各类具身智能机器人整机企业工业总产值超 200 亿元 2025-10-13 杭州：持续增强企业发展信心 更好形成具身智能机器人产业发展的良好氛围 2025-09-09 杭州征求意见：2027 年实现各类具身智能机器人整机企业工业总产值超 200 亿元 2025-09-09 杭州：拟开发搭载国产人工智能芯片的边缘计算服务器、AI 服务器等产品 2025-09-09 杭州市加快发展人工智能终端产业三年行动方案公开征求意见 2025-08-11 《杭州市促进具身智能机器人产业发展条例 (草案）》公开征求意见 2025-07-08 杭州：加快类脑智能产业化项目建设，支持类脑智能企业做大规模 2025-06-05 《杭州市加快建设人工智能创新高地实施方案 (2025 年版)》将出台 查看更多 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍

normalizedTitle: 今起施行 杭州为具身智能机器人立法
scoreReasoning: 地方政府针对具身智能立法，是AI产品形态和监管环境变化的早期具体信号。
summary: In 2024, Hangzhou enacted the city’s first local regulation for embodied intelligent robotics. The ordinance, titled “Regulations on Promoting the Development of the Embodied Intelligent Robot Industry”, aims to safeguard technological innovation and support high‑quality growth. Hangzhou already hosts over 700 robotics firms, and by 2025 its embodied‑robotics cluster is expected to generate 106.8 billion yuan in output value.

title: 摩尔线程完成 DeepSeek-V4 全链路工程化适配
content: 摩尔线程依托旗舰级 AI 训推一体智算卡 MTT S5000 与自研 MUSA 软件栈，基于 SGLang 开源推理框架，完成 DeepSeek-V4 的完整运行验证。 摩尔线程 依托旗舰级 AI 训推一体智算卡 MTT S5000 与自研 MUSA 软件栈，基于 SGLang 开源推理框架，完成 DeepSeek-V4 的完整运行验证。 摩尔线程完成 DeepSeek-V4 全链路工程化适配：S5000 基于 MUSA+SGLang 实现复杂 MoE 模型快速落地 网易科技 国产 GPU 就是牛！摩尔线程全链路适配 DeepSeek-V4 快科技 / 凤凰科技 摩尔线程完成 DeepSeek-V4 全链路工程化适配 网易科技 / 财联社 / 钛媒体 / 36Kr 2026-05-01 摩尔线程完成 DeepSeek-V4 全链路工程化适配 2026-04-24 摩尔线程 MTT S5000 完成对 DeepSeek-V4-Flash 适配 2026-03-27 摩尔线程 MTT S5000 完成 FlagOS AI 训练「全要素」验证 2026-02-26 摩尔线程 MTT S5000 全面适配阿里 Qwen3.5 三款新模型 2026-02-17 摩尔线程：完成对 Qwen3.5 模型全面适配 2026-02-14 摩尔线程完成 MiniMax M2.5 模型极速适配 2026-02-12 摩尔线程 MTT S5000 完成对智谱最新大模型的适配 2026-02-10 摩尔线程开源 TileLang-MUSA 以高效算子开发释放全功能 GPU 计算潜力 2025-12-21 上市 15 天，摩尔线程剑指英伟达腹地 2025-12-10 摩尔线程将发布新一代 GPU 架构 查看更多 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍
eventKey: 摩尔线程完成-deepseek-v4-全链路工程化适配
normalizedTitle: 摩尔线程完成 deepseek-v4 全链路工程化适配
scoreReasoning: 具体AI芯片与模型的工程适配进展，是科技平台与芯片格局变化的微观技术信号。
summary: MooreThread has validated the full operation of DeepSeek‑V4 using its flagship AI training and inference card, the MTT S5000, and its custom MUSA software stack. Leveraging the open‑source SGLang inference framework, the team completed complete end‑to‑end testing of the model. This demonstrates the compatibility and performance of DeepSeek‑V4 within MooreThread’s hardware and software ecosystem.

title: DeepSeek V4–almost on the frontier, a fraction of the price
content: Chinese AI lab DeepSeek’s last model release was V3.2 (and V3.2 Speciale) last December. They just dropped the first of their hotly anticipated V4 series in the shape of two … Sponsored by: MongoDB — Join MongoDB.local London 2026 on 7 May to learn how teams move AI from prototype to production. DeepSeek V4—almost on the frontier, a fraction of the price 24th April 2026 Chinese AI lab DeepSeek’s last model release was V3.2 (and V3.2 Speciale) last December . They just dropped the first of their hotly anticipated V4 series in the shape of two preview models, DeepSeek-V4-Pro and DeepSeek-V4-Flash . Both models are 1 million token context Mixture of Experts. Pro is 1.6T total parameters, 49B active. Flash is 284B total, 13B active. They’re using the standard MIT license. I think this makes DeepSeek-V4-Pro the new largest open weights model. It’s larger than Kimi K2.6 (1.1T) and GLM-5.1 (754B) and more than twice the size of DeepSeek V3.2 (685B). Pro is 865GB on Hugging Face, Flash is 160GB. I’m hoping that a lightly quantized Flash will run on my 128GB M5 MacBook Pro. It’s possible the Pro model may run on it if I can stream just the necessary active experts from disk. For the moment I tried the models out via OpenRouter , using llm-openrouter : llm install llm-openrouter llm openrouter refresh llm -m openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro 'Generate an SVG of a pelican riding a bicycle' Here’s the pelican for DeepSeek-V4-Flash : And for DeepSeek-V4-Pro : For comparison, take a look at the pelicans I got from DeepSeek V3.2 in December , V3.1 in August , and V3-0324 in March
eventKey: deepseek-v4–almost-frontier-fraction-price
normalizedTitle: deepseek v4–almost on the frontier a fraction of the price
scoreReasoning: Hacker News 社区讨论帖。提DeepSeek成本优势，属二手转述，无首发硬数据，信号强度中等。
summary: DeepSeek V4 is a new AI model positioned near the state‑of‑the‑art, offering comparable performance to higher‑priced alternatives while being significantly cheaper. Its release is noted on Hacker News, where users highlight its cost efficiency and advanced capabilities.

title: Claude 的拍马屁报告 | 原文
